description: Dark theme semantic color tokens for AI and code. Same role keys as color-semantic.json; values reference design-system/tokens/color-primitives.json only. Use with the same CSS variable names as light theme; swap token source by theme (e.g. [data-theme="dark"]).

default.description: Dark theme: primary actions, links, focus rings. Lighter blue for contrast on dark background.base. Pair with primary.onPrimary (white) on filled buttons; exceeds 4.5:1 on typical dark fills.

hover.description: Dark theme: hover for primary controls. Lighter than default for visible hover on dark UI.

muted.description: Dark theme: primary tint backgrounds (badges, highlights). Pair text with primitive.blue.100 or blue.200 for ≥4.5:1.

onPrimary.description: Dark theme: text/icons on primary fill (blue.400/500). White on blue.400 meets ≥4.5:1.

default.description: Dark theme: secondary buttons, borders, links. Pair with onSecondary (white) on filled secondary; ≥4.5:1 on dark background.base for borders.

hover.description: Dark theme: hover for secondary controls. Lighter slate for visibility.

muted.description: Dark theme: neutral secondary surfaces. Pair text with primitive.slate.100 or slate.200 for ≥4.5:1.

onSecondary.description: Dark theme: text/icons on secondary fill (slate.500). White on slate.500 meets ≥4.5:1.

base.description: Dark theme: page and app root background. Pair with text.primary (gray.50) and text.secondary (gray.400) for ≥4.5:1.

surface.description: Dark theme: cards, panels. Elevated above background.base. Use text.primary on surface for ≥4.5:1.

surfaceElevated.description: Dark theme: modals, dropdowns, popovers. Use border from primitive.gray.600 or zinc.600 for ≥3:1 UI contrast.

subtle.description: Dark theme: disabled backgrounds, subtle sections. Pair text with primitive.gray.300 or zinc.300 for ≥4.5:1.

primary.description: Dark theme: body and headings on dark backgrounds. Gray.50 on gray.900 ≥4.5:1.

secondary.description: Dark theme: supporting text, labels. Gray.400 on gray.900 ≥4.5:1.

muted.description: Dark theme: placeholders, hints, disabled text. Prefer on gray.900/800; use large text or non-critical UI if contrast is borderline.

inverse.description: Dark theme: text on light fills (e.g. inverted chip, light accent). Use when background is light (gray.100+).

default.description: Dark theme: success messages, positive indicators. Green.400 on gray.900 ≥4.5:1.

muted.description: Dark theme: success backgrounds. Pair text with primitive.green.200 or green.300 for ≥4.5:1.

onSuccess.description: Dark theme: text/icons on success fill (e.g. green.500/600 button). White on green.600 > 4.5:1.

default.description: Dark theme: warnings, caution. Amber.400 on gray.900 ≥4.5:1 for normal text.

muted.description: Dark theme: warning backgrounds. Pair text with primitive.amber.200 or amber.300 for ≥4.5:1.

onWarning.description: Dark theme: text/icons on warning fill (e.g. amber.600/700). Amber.100 on amber.700 meets ≥4.5:1; use common.white on amber.500 if product prefers light-on-amber.

default.description: Dark theme: errors, destructive actions. Red.400 on gray.900 ≥4.5:1.

hover.description: Dark theme: hover for danger controls.

muted.description: Dark theme: error backgrounds. Pair text with primitive.red.200 or red.300 for ≥4.5:1.

onDanger.description: Dark theme: text/icons on danger fill. White on red.500/600 > 4.5:1.
